title: Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline
description: Create .github/workflows/ CI configuration as specified in testing-strategy.md Section 8. Include: (1) unit-tests job: runs make test on ubuntu-latest, (2) corpus-tests job: runs make fetch-test-grammars && make test-corpus with 10m timeout, (3) benchmarks job: runs make bench on PRs, tracks results with benchmark-action, alerts at 150% threshold, (4) Multi-platform matrix: Linux x86-64 and ARM64, macOS ARM64, Windows x86-64. Use Go 1.22+. Also add the Makefile targets if any are missing (test, test-corpus, test-crosscheck, bench, fetch-test-grammars). Reference: docs/testing-strategy.md Section 8.
